args: $envFile = Get-Item .env -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $envFile) { $envFile = Get-Item ..\.env -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if ($envFile) { Get-Content $envFile | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -match '^(?:\s*#|\s*)$') { return }; $parts = $_ -split '=',2; if ($parts.Length -eq 2) { $name = $parts[0].Trim(); $value = $parts[1].Trim(); Set-Item env:$name $value } } }; & npx @bytebase/dbhub@latest --transport stdio --dsn "postgresql://postgres:$env:SUPABASE_DB_PASSWORD@db.gjnftqixijevvjlmozav.supabase.co:5432/postgres"
